zh.title: 比特币/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱整理格局
zh.content:
当前BTC短线呈窄幅震荡格局，价格围绕64000附近反复整理，整体波动收敛但上方压力逐步显现，市场暂未形成有效方向突破，更多表现为多空拉锯后的整理阶段。

技术指标显示价格持续受制于SMA20均线下方，均线结构偏空形成动态压制。MACD维持负值区域运行，动能柱走弱，说明反弹力度不足，短线缺乏趋势性上行动力。

下方支撑重点关注63800一线密集成交区，一旦失守可能进一步下探63500区域寻找支撑；上方阻力集中在64100至64200附近，均线与前高形成共振压制。

操作上建议保持区间思路为主，在未突破均线压制前避免追多，可考虑支撑附近分批低吸，反弹至阻力区域逐步兑现利润，控制仓位应对震荡行情。

en.title: Bitcoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Price action in BTC/USD is currently extremely compressed, with the market trading in a narrow intraday band just below 64,000. The near-flat 24-hour change reflects equilibrium between buyers and sellers after recent directional indecision. Despite the lack of volatility, price remains slightly biased to the downside as it sits under the 20-period SMA, suggesting that bullish momentum has not yet reasserted control.

From a trend perspective, the structure leans mildly bearish in the short term. Price is holding below the SMA(20) at 64195, which now acts as dynamic resistance. The MACD reading is negative at -72.40, indicating weakening momentum, even though signal confirmation is unavailable. This combination typically suggests consolidation within a broader corrective phase rather than a fresh impulsive uptrend.

Support is currently concentrated around the lower boundary of the tight range near 63950–63960, with a secondary support zone around 63800 if selling pressure intensifies. On the upside, immediate resistance lies at 64050–64195, followed by a stronger ceiling near 64500 where prior liquidity clusters may exist. A decisive break above the SMA would be needed to shift bias back toward bullish continuation.

Trading-wise, conditions favor short-term range strategies over trend following. Scalpers may look for long entries near support with tight stops below 63800, while short setups become more attractive on failed breakouts near 64150–64200. Until volatility expands, risk management is critical, as false breakouts are more likely in this low-momentum environment.
